summary: Creates passive stability for dynamic objects before agent contact.
constraints: Dynamic objects used in manipulation should drift <= 8 px during passive stability checks.
Place the support just below the object so the object rests without overlap.
Use low elasticity and moderate friction unless the prompt explicitly requires bouncing or sliding.
Name support geometry clearly, e.g. main_floor, support_shelf, or guide_floor.
repair_guidance: If object_not_passively_stable appears, add or reposition a floor/shelf/rail under the object.
Avoid placing the object in midair unless the capability profile says zero_g or flying.
